title: Productive Cherry Trees
description: Collect resources from falling leafs! Made for 2026 ModFest.
body:
# Productive cherry trees
This mod adds special cherry tree variants that occasionally drop petals which when mined, drop valuable resources.

![Lots of trees ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcae70cea034e0b3e4a3c935d020f235b31e8aef.png)

## Crafting
To create those variants, there's the sapling infuser that combines the blocks placed around it with a sapling placed on top. There's also another way to get other types of petals. Petal fusion which happens when one type of petals is under a tree of a different type. When the tree tries dropping petals there then the petals will fuse together into a third type. The varient's sapling can be obtained by combining the petals with a cherry sapling in a sapling infuser.

## Features
- A few tree variants (maybe ~~later~~ never, many)
- Sapling infuser 
  - And recipe type to add new recipes with datapacks
- Petal fusion 
  - And recipe type to add new recipes with datapacks
- Recipes are shown in ReliableRecipeViewer

## Trees
- Fire, made with lava and cherry sapling in sapling infuser
- Water, made with water and cherry sapling in sapling infuser
- Stone, made by Fire on Water petal fusion
- Gold, made with gold block and stone cherry sapling in sapling infuser
  - or rarely made by stone on itself fusion
- Test, creative variant (the pink one in screenshots)
